markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review GTM campaign performance and plan future outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Lovable Campaign Drove Significant Engagement:** The campaign generated 196 positive replies (132 email, 64 LinkedIn) and an estimated 60–100 registrants, a conservative floor due to tracking limitations.](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [**LinkedIn Outperforms Email:** LinkedIn DMs yielded a 16% positive reply rate (64/400), far exceeding email's 0.29% rate (132/45k). This success is limited by a low 10% connection acceptance rate.](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [**New Strategy: Intent-Based Segmentation:** Future campaigns will segment audiences by intent (e.g., Casey Hill post engagers) to deliver hyper-relevant offers (e.g., webinar recordings, guides) and test performance against cold lists.](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
  - [**Immediate Priorities:** Launch the Casey Hill workshop campaign ASAP and explore Understory RevOps support to configure HubSpot, filling a critical GTM operations gap.](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)

## Topics

### Campaign Performance Review

  - [**Lovable Webinar Campaign**](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
      - [**Email:** 45k sent → 132 positive replies (0.29% rate).](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
      - [**LinkedIn:** 400 DMs sent → 64 positive replies (16% rate).](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
      - [**Registrants:** 61 tracked via email match; estimated 60–100 total.](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
          - [**Tracking Gap:** The estimate accounts for untracked LinkedIn-driven registrations and users with non-matching emails.](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [**Attendees:** 25–50.](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
      - [**Note:** These numbers are a conservative floor; the final registrant list is still growing.](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=1601.0)
  - [**Breakfast Event Campaign**](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
      - [**Email:** 1.5k sent → 26 positive replies.](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
      - [**LinkedIn:** 11 DMs sent → 3 positive replies.](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
          - [**Constraint:** Low 10% connection acceptance rate limited DM volume.](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
      - [**Registrants:** 4 tracked.](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
      - [**Attendees:** 1 of 4 tracked registrants attended.](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
          - [**Tracking Gap:** A name-based search is needed to find attendees who used non-matching emails.](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)

### New Outreach Strategy: Intent-Based Segmentation

  - [**Goal:** Improve campaign performance by targeting high-intent audiences with tailored offers.](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [**Audience Source:** Scrape LinkedIn post engagers (e.g., Casey Hill's 20k+ followers) using Clay's native features, avoiding the need for a separate SIFT subscription.](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
  - [**Execution:**](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
      - [Run a separate campaign for the Casey Hill workshop targeting his post engagers.](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
      - [Test this list against a cold list to measure the performance uplift from intent-based targeting.](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
      - [Integrate this into the evergreen community promotion campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [**Offer Strategy:** Danni will define specific offers (e.g., webinar recordings, guides) for each audience segment.](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)

### GTM Operations & Scaling

  - [**HubSpot Configuration:** Understory needs RevOps support to configure HubSpot (e.g., properties, campaigns) after their fractional RevOps consultant departs.](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
  - [**LinkedIn Account Scaling:** To increase outreach volume, Understory will explore adding more team accounts (e.g., Danni, Marcel) for future campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Mark:**](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
      - [Conduct a name-based search to find untracked Breakfast event attendees.](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
      - [Provide a calendar of email send dates for the Lovable and Breakfast campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
      - [Create a campaign doc for the intent-based outreach strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
      - [Ask Naufal about adding more Understory team accounts for LinkedIn outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)
      - [Connect Understory with the Understory RevOps specialist to discuss HubSpot support.](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
  - [**Gloria:**](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
      - [Deliver campaign briefs for the Casey Hill workshop and the next Breakfast event.](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
      - [Send the final, updated Lovable registrant list to Mark.](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=1601.0)
  - [**Danni:**](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
      - [Define specific offers for each audience segment in the new campaign doc.](https://fathom.video/share/iLuh3GYRZQNnUedmwJqHfzosVsoPZk5G?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
